prompt: Studio product photography of a sleek matte white skincare tube with a minimalist unbranded label, resting on warm sand-toned travertine stone. Soft parchment cream background with linen texture. Warm golden light from above-right. Props: one smooth river stone and a dried eucalyptus leaf at lower right. No text, no logos, no people. Spa-like, clean mood. Avoid: busy backgrounds, artificial neon light, watermarks, stock photo cliches.
